message:
fix(config/lua): restore event emission flag after emit_event completes

The is_event_emission registry flag was set to true at the start of
emit_event but never restored, causing nested or sequential emit calls
to incorrectly report that they were inside an event emission. This fix
saves the prior flag value before setting it and restores it in all exit
paths (success, handler-cancelled, and error).

Changes:
- is_event_emission(): switched from direct registry read to explicit
  Nil/Boolean/other match for type-safe extraction
- emit_event(): save was_emitting before setting flag, restore in early
  return (handler returns false) and in the normal/error exit via a
  match on (result, restore_result)
- Added import reorder (anyhow::{Context, anyhow}) and trailing
  semicolon fix in exec_domain
- Two new tests: event_emission_flag_defaults_false_and_is_restored_
  after_success and event_emission_flag_is_restored_after_handler_error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
